title: Wenn der weiße Flieder wieder blüht
writer: Fritz Rotter, Eberhard Keindorff, Johanna Sibelius
actors: Willy Fritsch, Magda Schneider, Romy Schneider
plot: Married couple Willy and Therese go separate ways. Willy leaves town and returns years later as a famous singer. But Therese is about to marry her best friend Peter. Little does Willy know that he and Therese have a now teen-aged ...
